passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 13-14): Read the following information to answer the questions:
Directions (Q. 15-16): Read the following information to answer the questions that follow: A + B means A is the daughter of B. A - B means A is the husband of B. A = B means A is the brother of B.
Directions (Q. 22-24): Read the following information to answer the questions: A + B means A is father of B. A - B means A is sister of B. A ÷ B means A is husband of B A × B means A is wife of B.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following means R is daughter of P? 1) P*L#K†R  2) XAP*R+Q  3) None of these 4) XAP*K†O  5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following means C is cousin of E? 1) C&MB*VE  2) PACKMBE 4) EBM*N@C  5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'P' means 'is father of', '+' means 'is sister of', '×' means and '÷' means 'is mother of' then which of the following statements means 'S is daughter of P'? 1) P ÷ T + R ÷ S  2) P + Q × R + S ÷ T 4) P + Q × R ÷ S + T  5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: D) A ⊗ B means A is mother of B. ii) A ■ B means A is sister of B. iii) A * B means A is husband of B. iv) A # B means A is brother of B. Which of the following means 'Q is grandfather of P'? 1) P ∆ N ■ M ∆ Q  2) Q * N ■ M ∆ P 4) Q * M ■ N ∆ P  5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following means N is uncle of M? 1) N# P ■ L∆E ∆ M  2) N * M ∆ Y 4) N@C∆P*M  5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: P + Q means P is the brother of Q. P - Q means P is the mother of Q and P ÷ Q means P is the sister of Q. Which of the following means M is the maternal uncle of R? 1) M + K ÷ R  2) M - R + K 4) M ÷ K - R  5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If A + B means A is the brother of B, A = B means A is the father of B and A × B means A is the sister of B, which of the following means M is the uncle of P? 1) N × P ÷ M  2) M + S = R ÷ P 4) M + K = T × P  5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If P + Q = R, which of the following is true? 1) R is the mother of P. 2) R is the sister-in-law of P. 4) R is the aunt of P. 4) R is the mother-in-law of P. 5) None of these

choices.1: R is the mother of P.
choices.2: R is the sister-in-law of P.
choices.4: R is the aunt of P.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following means S is granddaughter of R? 1) R + P ÷ Q + S  2) K + R + P × Q + L + S 5) K + R + P × Q + S + L  4) Can't be determined 5) None of these

choices.2: K + R + P × Q + L + S
choices.5: K + R + P × Q + S + L

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following means P has a blood-relationship with Q? 1) R + P × K + L × M ÷ Q  2) R + P + K + L + Q ÷ M 3) R + P × K + L × M ÷ N + Q  4) R + P × K + L × Q 5) None of these

choices.1: R + P × K + L × M ÷ Q
choices.2: R + P + K + L + Q ÷ M
choices.3: R + P × K + L × M ÷ N + Q

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following means P is grandmother of Q? 1) P + R + S + T + U ÷ Q  2) P + R + S + T × Q 3) P + R + S + B + K × L + Q  4) P + R + S + T + Q + U 5) None of these

choices.1: P + R + S + T + U ÷ Q
choices.3: P + R + S + B + K × L + Q
choices.4: P + R + S + T + Q + U
